topics.topic_en: Lee's 'Fabricated Indictment' Special Counsel and Charge-Dropping Controversy
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung labeled his own criminal prosecutions 'judicial murder via fabricated indictment' in a May 9 social media post, fueling the DPK-backed bill to appoint a special counsel empowered to drop those charges. Opposition parties and civil society groups warn this amounts to self-exoneration and a violation of rule of law, calling it the decisive factor behind a recent conservative rally in local election polls.

evidence_headlines.title: 속도 조절 주문한 李 대통령 결국 '조작 기소'…특검법 힘 받나
與, 조작기소 특검법 발의…'조작 인정시 특검이 공소취소 판단'
시민사회연석회의, 이재명 대통령 형사재판 공소 취소 추진 중단 촉구

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Polling Tightens Across Regions
topics.summary: With 24 days until the June 3 local elections, polls that once suggested a DPK 'fifteen-to-one landslide' have narrowed sharply, with the Busan mayor race at 46.9% vs 40.7% and the Daegu mayor race within the margin of error. Analysts attribute the conservative rally to the charge-dropping controversy and housing market anxieties.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 대구·부산시장 접전‥부산 북구갑 3파전 '혼전'
보수결집? 여론조사 살펴보니 5월 대구-부-울시장 접전…'공소취소' 결정타
'15대1 압승론'서 6곳 박빙으로…'선거판 흔든 공소취소·부동산'

topics.topic_en: Yoon Seok-yeol Insurrection Trial Nears First-Instance Verdict
topics.summary: The main insurrection trial against former President Yoon Seok-yeol is set for a first-instance verdict on May 28; separately, an appeals court raised his arrest-obstruction sentence from five to seven years on April 29. The second Comprehensive Special Counsel, with up to 251 staff and a 170-day mandate covering 17 categories of allegations, is now operational.

evidence_headlines.title: 2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지
'2차 종합특검법' 국회 통과‥최장 170일간 수사
윤석열 내란 재판/전개

topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Vote Fails, Referendum Derailed
topics.summary: A constitutional amendment backed by six parties and 167 lawmakers failed to pass a May 7 plenary vote after PPP lawmakers boycotted, preventing the two-thirds quorum. The DPK accuses PPP of 'election-strategy obstruction' while PPP insists re-listing the bill violates the rule against double jeopardy; a planned June 3 simultaneous referendum is now effectively off the table.

evidence_headlines.title: 39년 만의 개헌 무산‥'선거용 반대' vs '상정 자체가 위헌'
제10차 개헌/제22대 국회 개헌안
[정치] 이 대통령 지지율 67%…민주 46%·국민의힘 18% [NBS]

topics.topic_en: Han Dong-hoon Busan By-Election Splits PPP
topics.summary: Former PPP chairman Han Dong-hoon registered as an independent candidate for the June 3 Busan Buk-gap by-election, clashing directly with the PPP's official nominee Park Min-sik and accusing the party leadership of blocking him. The three-way race—Han, Park, and actor-turned-candidate Hah Jeong-u—has become a proxy war over who controls the post-Yoon conservative movement.

evidence_headlines.title: 한동훈, 북구갑 재보궐 예비후보 등록…'선거 승리로 보수 재건'
총출동 박민식 vs 나 홀로 한동훈‥갈라진 보수
[365 인물전망대] 5월 11일-한동훈 무소속 부산 북갑 국회의원 후보

topics.topic_en: Multi-Homeowner Capital Gains Tax Surcharge Restores Housing Anxiety
topics.summary: South Korea reinstated the multi-homeowner capital gains tax surcharge on May 9 after a four-year moratorium, shrinking available rental supply as landlords divest; Seoul apartment jeonse (key-money lease) listings fell 30% since January and weekly prices rose 0.23%. The housing squeeze is being credited alongside the charge-dropping controversy as a key driver of DPK's declining polling leads.

evidence_headlines.title: '이제 월세도 받을래요' 이런 집주인 늘었다...씨 마른 전세
다주택자 양도세 중과유예 종료, 뭐가 달라져요?
2026년 5월 11일 오늘의 주요 뉴스(코스피 사상 최고치 경신과 다주택자 양도세 중과 재시행 등)

topics.topic_en: Prosecution Reform Transition to 중수청 and 공소청
topics.summary: The laws creating the new Serious Crime Investigation Agency (중수청) and Public Prosecution Office (공소청) passed in March 2026, disbanding the existing prosecution service; the government is now managing a nine-month personnel transition expected to complete by September. Debate continues over residual investigative powers for prosecutors and an intra-DPK rift between reform hardliners and moderates.

evidence_headlines.title: 공소청·중수청 법안 국회 통과…기소는 공소청, 수사는 중수청 담당
이재명 정부 검찰 수사권 분리
민주당 '검찰독재 끝났다' 자평… 국민의힘 '최악의 개악' 반발

topics.topic_en: Korea-US Trade Deal Shaken by US Court Tariff Rulings
topics.summary: U.S. federal courts struck down the Trump administration's global 10% tariff (following an earlier ruling against reciprocal tariffs), casting doubt on the validity of the Korea-U.S. framework under which Seoul pledged roughly 500 trillion won in U.S. investment in exchange for tariff reductions to 15%. The government and business community are assessing whether the investment commitments retain their rationale.

evidence_headlines.title: 흔들리는 트럼프 관세 전략…500조 대미 투자 이대로 GO?
상호관세 이어 글로벌 관세도 위법 판결…트럼프 관세정책 잇따라 제동
2025년 세계 무역 전쟁/대한민국

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
